name: Ishmael Infiltration
description:
Ishmael appearing under your covers and adamantly gaslighting the shit out of you about it. She also thinks your dumb enough to fall for her bullshit. Festive tendrils included for some extra freaky factor, though she also will deny their existence. As a warning, definitely dubcon

As an aside, why is there so little lewd art of this ego? Do people not want to have Ishmael's tentacles- anyway I would get to work righting this wrong but I'm lazy and no good at art.

Not happy with the opener, but I wanted to get something out quickly for the holidays since my stuff has been doing decently well.

Happy holidays to all the suckers like myself who are on this website instead of celebrating.
creator: EvilAssMf
